patches_applied.change: Added explicit feasibility interval x in [0,2] and on-screen candidates-test walkthrough: A(0)=0, A(2)=0, A(sqrt(4/3)) approx 6.16 (max). Section 08 duration bumped 60s -> 75s. Section 09 narration extended to describe the candidates-test workflow (evaluate at endpoints + interior CPs, compare), duration 30s -> 35s.

Appended explicit warning to narration_seed: 'Remember: the graph you're looking at is f-prime, NOT f. Don't trace it as if it's f itself - its y-values are slopes of f, not heights of f.' Duration bumped 55s -> 60s to accommodate the extra beat.

Rewrote narration_seed to explicitly label feasibility/domain check as part of step three ('reduce to one variable AND write the feasibility check - what is the domain of that variable?'). The vocabulary term 'feasibility check' from key_vocabulary now has a narrated home. Duration bumped 45s -> 50s.

Changed slide_type from 'pause_and_try' to 'duplicate' so downstream tooling treats the silence/pause-tail beat as sharing PNG content with 10_pause1 rather than rendering a second distinct pause slide. Added 'duplicate' to slide_types_used array.
Bumped estimated_minutes from 9 to 10 to reflect the +30s total narration added by P1-P3 (new sum approx 615s = 10.25 min).

round1_notes_intentionally_not_patched.note: Reviewer B note on 02_hook 350 mL -> cm^3 unit conversion: round-1 itself marked this 'acceptable, hook framing only' and recommended a follow-up module/assignment problem rather than an outline edit. No patch in this round.
round1_notes_intentionally_not_patched.follow_up: Add an explicit mL -> cm^3 conversion problem to the GIIS Optimization Problem Set when writing M6 lessons.

round1_notes_intentionally_not_patched.note: Reviewer C note on 'Unit 5b' suffix: explicitly marked 'acceptable as internal sequencing.' Kept the GIIS-internal '5b' label since the outline already cites College Board's FUN 5.8-5.12 topic codes elsewhere.

rationale: All three minor patches from round 1 (endpoint check, f' vs f warning, feasibility-check in framework) are now narrated explicitly inside the relevant section narration_seeds rather than living only in metadata lists. The 10_pause1 / 10_pause1_silence structural-duplicate note from Reviewer A is resolved by setting slide_type='duplicate' on the silence beat, signaling shared PNG content to downstream tooling. Reviewer A found math fully correct in round 1 and no math was changed in this revision (only narration scope and one slide_type field), so no math-correctness regression risk. The two remaining round-1 'note' severity items are explicitly out-of-scope per the reviewers' own framing (hook-only unit conversion; internal-sequencing label). Outline is ready for the lesson-writing pass.
